subcodes.first_line: O Desire of the yearning ones and Sought-After of the sincere, Light of the heavens and of the earth, I supplicate unto the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مقصود المشتاقین و مطلوب المخلصین و نور السموات و الارضین اتضرع الی ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
